# Test create-infographic command validation only (no network calls)

# Test create-infographic without arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test create-infographic
stderr 'usage: nlm create-infographic <notebook-id> <instructions>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test create-infographic with only one argument (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test create-infographic notebook123
stderr 'usage: nlm create-infographic <notebook-id> <instructions>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test create-infographic without authentication (should fail)
! exec ./nlm_test create-infographic notebook123 'Create an infographic'
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test create-infographic with multi-word prompt parsing
! exec ./nlm_test create-infographic notebook123 create an infographic
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'
